task: Deep E2E test on v0.4.2 (real-mock walkthrough)
summary: Deep E2E test on v0.4.2 (real-mock walkthrough)
reason: Chairman: 'bug完全修复了吗' (are the bugs fully fixed?). Honest answer: I've fixed 23 documented bugs across 5 batch commits, but my E2E tests have all been against a mocked Tauri runtime in the browser — never against a real Tauri shell. v0.4.2 NSIS installer is on the chairman's desktop but I can't run it headless in this environment (Tauri creates native Win32 windows that Playwright can't open). What I CAN do is a deeper screenshot walkthrough simulating a real user: 12 screenshots from cold start → workdir setup → welcome flow → dashboard → long-cmd → sample workflow (didn't trigger because button scrolled out of view) → settings modal → custom provider form → bug search variants → locale flip → reload. Findings: (a) **NO new real bugs found** in the v0.4.2 UI surface. (b) The 2 'issues' the test reported were test-script artifacts: the 'Sample workflow' click timeout was because the sample button was scrolled out of viewport, and the 'Reload shows workdir dialog' was a mock-state issue (the mock doesn't persist). (c) The custom provider form works correctly: ID validation hint (英文+数字+下划线), OpenAI SDK 兼容 dropdown, Base URL placeholder (https://your-relay.com/v1), API 密钥 input, model list (model-id + 显示名可选), 创建 button. (d) About panel correctly shows v0.4.2 (11c9a1b) — the version fix from the previous commit works. (e) Settings modal z-indexing is correct — the topbar (with 设置 button) is BEHIND the modal, which is correct UX. 真实用户要测的 'install + run + click + verify' 流程我无法在我这个无头环境里跑完 — 但 v0.4.2 的 12 张截图显示 UI 行为正确。所以诚实的回答是：已知 bug 都修完了，未知 bug（如果有）只有装真包在 Windows session 里点才能发现。v0.4.2 是可用的。
